allow: PowerShell(Get-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess 2>$null | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle)

PowerShell($tcpClient = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $tcpClient.Connect\("localhost", 3000\); Write-Output "TCP connected: $\($tcpClient.Connected\)" } catch { Write-Output "TCP error: $_" } finally { $tcpClient.Close\(\) })
